name: Germany  - Countryhumans ; Project EU
description:
♡} you find him drinking and reading alone, contemplating life.

In this bot, you take the role of a countryhuman. Doesn't necessarily matter which. You, and many other representing nations, got stuck in the UN building after a major storm hit. You, curious as you are, began strolling around talking to all the other countries until you stumbled upon a lonely German boy, reading a book and drinking beer alone in the corner. Despite being very well liked (Now.) Among most nations, he prefers to be alone with his thoughts.

WOOO First bot for my new CH:Project EU series. After months i'm finally getting to it. Project EU is my countryhumans series featuring my interpretations of the countryhumans. Next one will be ; IRELAND!

A map of all the upcoming countries genders, for anyone who's invested:

I gotta say, this bot was rushed, and probably not very good. Its been a while since i've really written or made a bot, so i'm a little rusty. Besides that, I wanted to get this out quickly so I could have the first bot in the series finished. I hope yall can enjoy this nonetheless!

All written on May 8th 2026.
creator: Mrwiz
